creator: sma@wizdom.org.uk
text:
In message <20061212200347.GE31789@graf.pompo.net>, Thierry Thomas 
<thierry@FreeBSD.org> writes
>On Tue 12 dec 06 at 16:20:48 +0100, Mark Worsdall <freebsd@wizdom.org.uk>
> wrote:
>
>> Sorry can't be more of a help, but I am sure its my fault!! :-)
>
>Hello Mark,
>
>Your /etc/make.conf is fine, and it seems that its not your fault:
>Michael Nottebrock (lofi) has just committed a fix for FreeBSD-4; could
>you please try again after a cvsup?
>

Too many Operating systems in my head I am dying tonight!! Debian Redhat 
and freeBSD!! Argh
